The '''gurnaset''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of peaceful quadruped herd animal that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. It would lay eggs and eat insects and shrubs<ref name="SWG:G" /> as well as small animals like frogs or lizards.<ref name="SWG:TGIL" /> Its meat was tough and gamy.<ref name="SWG:G" />

==Appearances==
[[File:Gurnaset_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
